categories.name: Loop Rate Limit
categories.description: Make loop processing vs Slack 1 req/sec per method

categories.name: Block Kit JSON in Make
categories.description: Make's JSON generation for Slack Block Kit

categories.name: Connection Health & Re-auth
categories.description: Make Slack connection expiry and monitoring

mappings.toolAValue: Make loop: processes items as fast as possible
mappings.toolBValue: Slack: 1 req/sec per method per workspace
mappings.notes: Loop of 50 items sends 50 Slack requests in <1s. All after first get 429.
mappings.fixStrategy: Add Make 'Throttle' module set to 1 req/sec before Slack module. Or aggregate into one message.

mappings.toolAValue: Make JSON module outputs (may have trailing commas, mismatched brackets)
mappings.toolBValue: Slack Block Kit: strict JSON with no trailing commas
mappings.notes: Make's JSON modules frequently produce invalid JSON for nested Block Kit structures.
mappings.fixStrategy: Build Block Kit as single text string. Validate JSON in Make before sending. Use Slack Block Kit Builder.

mappings.toolAValue: Make Slack connection (OAuth, has expiry status)
mappings.notes: Connection revoked → scenario silently stops processing Slack messages. No alert to user.
mappings.fixStrategy: Add Make error handler route that sends email/alternative notification on connection failure.

errors.errorName: Scenario Loop Floods Slack Rate Limit
errors.description: Make loop without throttle exceeds Slack 1 req/sec.
errors.fixSummary: Add Throttle module set to 1 second between requests.

errors.errorName: Make JSON Module Produces Invalid Block Kit
errors.description: Nested JSON arrays in Make have syntax errors.
errors.fixSummary: Build as text string. Validate externally.
